words.exampleMeaning: While we were waiting, it started to rain.

words.example: После того как он ушёл, мы продолжили работу.
words.exampleMeaning: After he left, we continued working.

words.example: Перед тем как уйти, он попрощался со всеми.
words.exampleMeaning: Before leaving, he said goodbye to everyone.

words.example: Она работала, в то время как он отдыхал.
words.exampleMeaning: She was working, while he was resting.

words.meaning: in (after a period of time) / through
words.exampleMeaning: I'll be back in an hour.

words.example: Он уехал в 2020 году, и с тех пор мы не виделись.
words.exampleMeaning: He left in 2020, and we haven't seen each other since then.

words.example: Я до сих пор помню этот день.
Мама готовила обед. Тем временем дети играли во дворе.
words.exampleMeaning: Mom was making lunch. Meanwhile the children were playing in the yard.

words.meaning: long ago / for a long time
words.exampleMeaning: We haven't seen each other for a long time!

words.example: Однажды он решил поехать в Россию.
words.exampleMeaning: One day he decided to go to Russia.

items.sentence: Я вернусь ___ два часа. (in, after a period)

items.question: How do you say 'I'll be back in an hour'?
